ddls:
CREATE TABLE "market_data" (
  "id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each market data record */,
  "date_time" TEXT /* Timestamp of the market data record */,
  "open_price" REAL /* Opening price of the financial instrument */,
  "high_price" REAL /* Highest price of the financial instrument during the period */,
  "low_price" REAL /* Lowest price of the financial instrument during the period */,
  "close_price" REAL /* Closing price of the financial instrument */,
  "volume" INTEGER /* Volume of the financial instrument traded */,
  "chg_volume" INTEGER /* Change in volume compared to the previous period */,
  "open_interest" INTEGER /* Open interest of the financial instrument */,
  "chg_oi" INTEGER /* Change in open interest compared to the previous period */,
  "turnover" REAL /* Turnover (total value of trades) for the financial instrument */,
  "chg_turnover" REAL /* Change in turnover compared to the previous period */,
  "ask_volume1" INTEGER /* Volume of ask orders at the best ask price */,
  "bid_volume1" INTEGER /* Volume of bid orders at the best bid price */,
  "trading_time" TEXT /* Trading time of the market data record */,
  "instrument_id" INTEGER /* ID of the financial instrument */,
  "trading_session" TEXT /* Trading session (e.g., morning, afternoon, evening) */,
  "exchange_rate" REAL /* Exchange rate if the data is in a different currency */,
  "source" TEXT /* Source of the market data (e.g., API, feed provider) */,
  "quality_flag" TEXT /* Quality of the data (e.g., real-time, delayed) */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_market_data_instrument_id FOREIGN KEY ("instrument_id") REFERENCES financial_instruments ("instrument_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "financial_instruments" (
  "instrument_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each financial instrument */,
  "instrument_name" TEXT /* Name of the financial instrument */,
  "instrument_type" TEXT /* Type of the financial instrument (e.g., stock, future, option) */,
  "exchange" TEXT /* Exchange where the financial instrument is traded */,
  "symbol" TEXT /* Symbol or ticker of the financial instrument */,
  "currency" TEXT /* Currency in which the financial instrument is traded */,
  "lot_size" INTEGER /* Minimum tradeable quantity */,
  "tick_size" REAL /* Minimum price movement */,
  "expiry_date" TEXT /* Expiry date for futures and options */,
  "strike_price" REAL /* Strike price for options */,
  "underlying_asset" TEXT /* Underlying asset for futures and options */,
  "contract_size" INTEGER /* Contract size for futures and options */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("instrument_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "users" (
  "user_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each user */,
  "user_name" TEXT /* Full name of the user */,
  "email" TEXT /* Email address of the user */,
  "role" TEXT /* Role of the user (e.g., trader, analyst, admin) */,
  "department" TEXT /* Department the user belongs to */,
  "phone" TEXT /* Phone number of the user */,
  "last_login" TEXT /* Timestamp of the last login */,
  "status" TEXT /* Status of the user (e.g., active, inactive) */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("user_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "access_logs" (
  "access_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each access event */,
  "data_id" INTEGER /* ID of the market data record being accessed */,
  "user_id" INTEGER /* ID of the user accessing the market data */,
  "access_date" TEXT /* Date when the market data was accessed */,
  "access_type" TEXT /* Type of access (e.g., view, download) */,
  "ip_address" TEXT /* IP address from which the access was made */,
  "user_agent" TEXT /* User agent string of the client */,
  "duration" INTEGER /* Duration of the access event in seconds */,
  "result" TEXT /* Result of the access (e.g., success, failure) */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("access_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_access_logs_user_id FOREIGN KEY ("user_id") REFERENCES users ("user_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_access_logs_data_id FOREIGN KEY ("data_id") REFERENCES market_data ("id")
)
